/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REDUCE COUNT ONE, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 25400(A)(1), TO A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADVNL:001/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR ONE YEAR IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO STAY ARREST FREE, OBTAIN EMPLOYMENT OR ENROLL IN SCHOOL, AND COMPLETE 50 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE, IF DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES DIVERSION FOR ONE YEAR,THE PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND PROPOSED SENTENCE IS TO BE DISMISSED/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/PD/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/ORNAS/WS/WEAP/NTW60/LDPX:05-26-20 (60TH)/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-12-20/DOP/TE:1 HOUR/
/CAL  POSSIBLE DISMISSAL/X  DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDEMENT/WD/TEXT:DA WITHDRAWS COMPLAINT AND DISCHARGES DEFENDANT/COWD/
